inputs.label: Buy Price per Coin
inputs.businessContext: Price at which cryptocurrency was purchased (per unit)

businessContext_i18n.en: Price at which cryptocurrency was purchased (per unit)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kripto paranın satın alındığı fiyat (birim başına)
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis, zu dem die Kryptowährung gekauft wurde (pro Einheit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix auquel la cryptomonnaie a été achetée (par unité)
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio al que se compró la criptomoneda (por unidad)

inputs.label: Sell Price per Coin
inputs.businessContext: Price at which cryptocurrency is sold (per unit)

businessContext_i18n.en: Price at which cryptocurrency is sold (per unit)
businessContext_i18n.de: Preis, zu dem die Kryptowährung verkauft wird (pro Einheit)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix auquel la cryptomonnaie est vendue (par unité)
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio al que se vende la criptomoneda (por unidad)

inputs.label: Transaction Fee (%)
inputs.businessContext: Fee percentage charged per transaction (buy and sell)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fee percentage charged per transaction (buy and sell)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşlem başına alınan ücret yüzdesi (alış ve satış)
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Gebühr pro Transaktion (Kauf und Verkauf)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de frais facturé par transaction (achat et vente)
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de comisión por transacción (compra y venta)

inputs.label: Tax on Profit (%)
inputs.businessContext: Capital gains tax percentage applied to net profit

businessContext_i18n.en: Capital gains tax percentage applied to net profit
businessContext_i18n.tr: Net kâra uygulanan sermaye kazancı vergisi yüzdesi
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Kapitalertragssteuer, angewendet auf den Nettogewinn
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage d'impôt sur les plus-values appliqué au bénéfice net
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto a las ganancias de capital aplicado a la ganancia neta
